definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Entity" id="target_entity">target_entity</variable><variable type="String" id="str">str</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:str</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_string"><field name="NAME">text</field></block></value><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">try {&#10;			UUID uuid = UUID.fromString(str);&#10;			MinecraftServer server = ServerLifecycleHooks.getCurrentServer();&#10;			if (server != null) {&#10;				for (ServerLevel level : server.getAllLevels()) {&#10;					target_entity = level.getEntity(uuid);&#10;					if (target_entity != null)&#10;						break;&#10;				}&#10;			}&#10;		} catch (IllegalArgumentException ignored) {&#10;		}</field><next><block type="return_entity"><value name="return"><block type="variables_get_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:target_entity</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
